overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game showing a character ascending stairs and walking through a neon-lit urban downtown at night. The scene features futuristic architecture, glowing billboards, light vehicular traffic, and wet reflective streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered concrete stairway ascending to street level beneath overpass

events.description: character exits covered stairwell into open urban street with neon lighting
character completes ascent and turns left onto the street level

agents.ego_description: character walking up concrete stairs beneath an overpass, transitioning from enclosed stairwell to open street

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with yellow edge markings ascending beneath a structure
tall concrete wall with vertical green light fixtures mounted on it
green painted metal railing along the right side of the stairs
massive concrete overpass or bridge structure overhead with exposed beams
tall modern building with illuminated green-tinted windows and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a third-person view following a character ascending a concrete stairway beneath an urban overpass. Green wall-mounted lights illuminate the retaining wall on the left as the character climbs toward the street level, where neon-lit buildings become visible against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with green painted bike lane beneath neon-lit buildings

events.description: character turns left and begins walking along the green bike lane
futuristic black sedan drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the green bike lane, passing other pedestrians and observing the neon-lit surroundings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing on sidewalk looking at phone
futuristic black sedan driving down the street with headlights on

entered.detail: metal truss pedestrian walkway spanning across the street above
asphalt street surface painted with bright green lane markings and red hand symbols
sleek futuristic vehicles parked along the right curb
tall modern street lamps illuminating the road surface
large illuminated billboard with purple and white graphics mounted on distant building

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a green-painted bike lane in a wide-open urban street. Neon-lit buildings line the left side while futuristic cars are parked along the right. An overhead pedestrian bridge spans the street, and the character passes pedestrians and moving traffic while heading toward a distant intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk and traffic signals

events.description: character waits at crosswalk then begins crossing the multi-lane road
character completes crossing and steps onto the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: character crossing the road at a marked crosswalk, navigating between moving vehicles and following the pedestrian signal

notable_agents.action: white futuristic car driving through the intersection with headlights illuminated

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing lines painted on the asphalt
traffic signal pole with green walk signal illuminated

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an intersection and crosses the multi-lane road using a marked crosswalk. A traffic light displays a green walk signal as vehicles pass by. The character navigates across the wet asphalt and reaches the opposite sidewalk where different parked vehicles and urban furniture are visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with parked vehicles and commercial buildings

events.description: character continues walking past trash containers and parked cars along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: character walking along the sidewalk, passing parked futuristic vehicles and street furniture while heading toward distant neon signage

entered.detail: large green industrial trash bins and debris piled on the sidewalk
concrete building wall with graffiti and metal pipes running vertically

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character continuing along a concrete sidewalk on the far side of the intersection. Parked futuristic vehicles line the left side while a concrete building facade is visible on the right. The character passes trash containers and street lights while walking toward distant neon signs and building entrances further down the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character ascends from a dim underpass into the vibrant, neon-lit expanse of a futuristic downtown district. It begins with the character climbing a concrete stairway beneath an urban overpass, guided by green wall-mounted lights toward the glowing skyline above. As the character reaches street level, the scene opens into a wide urban thoroughfare where they walk along a green bike lane past parked futuristic cars and beneath a spanning pedestrian bridge. The camera then follows the character across a multi-lane intersection via a marked crosswalk, moving over wet asphalt under the glow of a green walk signal. Finally, the movement continues along a concrete sidewalk past street furniture and trash containers, heading deeper into the city toward distant neon signs and building entrances.
